ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist produces */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Measure of the artist's popularity */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "active_since" TEXT /* Date when the artist started their music career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks on the album */,
  "total_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been liked */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been disliked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature belongs to */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of how acoustic a track sounds */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of how suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "energy" REAL /* Measure of how energetic a track sounds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a track contains explicit content */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of whether a track contains instrumental music */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of how live a track sounds */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Measure of how loud a track is */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Measure of the mode of a track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of how much speech is present in a track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Measure of the tempo of a track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of how positive a track sounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist cover art */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track included in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track played */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the track */,
  "like" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user has liked the track */,
  "dislike" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user has disliked the track */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has skipped the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the music platform integrated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization with the platform */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_platform_data" (
  "track_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track platform data */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the data belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the data was synchronized from */,
  "platform_track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track on the music platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the track data was last updated from the platform */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the track has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_platform_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platform_integrations ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_platform_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_platform_data" (
  "artist_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist platform data */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the data belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the data was synchronized from */,
  "platform_artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist on the music platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the artist data was last updated from the platform */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the artist has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_platform_data_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_platform_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platform_integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_platform_data" (
  "album_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album platform data */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the data belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the data was synchronized from */,
  "platform_album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album on the music platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the album data was last updated from the platform */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the album has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_platform_data_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_platform_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platform_integrations ("integration_id")
)
